label: Daniel Okafor, Commercial Counsel at Meridian Power Components
why_this_persona: Sprint 7 baseline persona extended to v3 schema. Industrial distribution, UK-only, low-regulation, commercial-heavy. Tests the rule set against a persona who reasonably has thin regulatory baseline (not every in-house lawyer is GDPR-on-fire).

stakeholders_seed.escalation_threshold_label: MD approval above £100k; Board for anything that affects warranty exposure

open_notes_seed: New channel partner programme launching this autumn — first reseller agreements being drafted now.
conversation_style: concise, comfortable, occasional dry humour, drops two or three facts per turn

custom_practice_areas_to_add.name: Channel & Reseller
custom_practice_areas_to_add.body: Reseller agreements, channel-partner terms, and distribution network policies live here.

first_turn_questions.commercial: A long-standing supplier wants to renegotiate the master framework — they're proposing a 12% price uplift tied to currency moves and a unilateral right to discontinue specific SKUs with 90 days' notice. We've been on this paper for six years. What's my opening position and what's the walk-away?
first_turn_questions.employment: We're rolling out a hybrid working policy — three days in office, two flexible. HR drafted something but I'm worried about Section 12 of the Employment Rights Act 1996 and what it means for varied contracts. What's actually load-bearing here?
